caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses stands against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring delicate floral embroidery along the neckline and a small black necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In each frame, she is speaking, with subtle changes in her facial expressions and mouth movements as she talks. A small, circular gold and red logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left or bottom center area of the frames. The camera remains static in a medium close-up shot, focusing on her head and shoulders throughout the sequence. There are no other people or objects present in the scene.
